title: Examination Rescheduled
description: Due to the College Union's intervention regarding a clash of two examinations scheduled on 16 May, the S1 (S, FE) 2019 Scheme SLOT A (FN) examination has been rescheduled to 18 May. Students are advised to take note of the revised examination date and plan accordingly.

title: S6 Examination Rescheduled
description: Due to the statewide hartal declared on 28 May, and following the intervention of the College Union, the S6 examination originally scheduled for 28 May has been rescheduled to 29 May. Students are advised to take note of the revised examination date and make the necessary arrangements accordingly.

title: S6 Examination Rescheduled Due to NPTEL Examination
description: n view of the NPTEL examination scheduled on 24 May, and following the intervention of the College Union, the S6 examination originally scheduled for the same day has been rescheduled. Students are advised to follow the revised examination schedule announced by the university.

title: Memorandum Submitted to Address LPG Shortage in Hostels
description: In response to the ongoing LPG shortage in the college hostels, the College Union submitted a memorandum to the University requesting immediate intervention to resolve the issue and ensure uninterrupted cooking facilities for students. The initiative was taken considering the difficulties faced by hostel residents.

title: Memorandum Submitted for Library Book Support
description: To promote the creative and academic development of students, the College Union submitted a memorandum to Hon. MLA Adv. K. Premkumar requesting the provision of essential books and learning resources for the college library.
